perturbation.original_text: The organisation (in this c ase LSP) is responsible for ensuring their staff/ sub-contractors adhere to the terms of this agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The organisation (in this c ase LSP) will encourage their staff/ sub-contractors to generally adhere to the terms of this agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change weakens the obligation on the LSP. The original text clearly states the LSP 'is responsible for ensuring' adherence to the agreement. The modified text changes this to 'will encourage' adherence, making it a non-binding suggestion. This creates an in-text contradiction, as it weakens the LSP's responsibility for compliance with data protection, potentially creating uncertainty on liabilities.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The organisation (in this c ase LSP) will encourage their staff/ sub-contractors to generally adhere to the terms of this agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the LSP 'is responsible for ensuring' adherence, creating a clear obligation. The changed text weakens this to 'will encourage', making it a suggestion. The contradicted text which is the same as the changed text, now contradicts the implicit understanding of the original contract, where the LSP had a stronger obligation. Therefore, the change creates a contradiction by weakening the LSP's responsibility for compliance.
